summary.shape_sentence: Early pop and lower-high fade, brief midday reclaim attempt, then steady afternoon trend-down into a near-LOD close.

goat.note: Downside continuation after the failed late-morning rebound.

red_circles.behavior: Clustered near rally peaks and on the afternoon downslope, confirming repeated lower highs and short entries.

green_circles.behavior: Mostly appeared during the mid-morning bounce; they generated only temporary lifts and failed to reverse control.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply was stacked roughly in the 23420-23580 zone and was respected repeatedly; bounce attempts stalled there.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand first appeared around 23260-23320, then lower around 23080-23150; upper demand failed while the final lower band only slowed the decline.

time_markers.10am_blue: Opening strength had failed and price was rotating lower out of upper supply into the first meaningful sell impulse.
time_markers.12pm_red: The rebound was stalling into resistance; structure was weakening ahead of the next leg down.
time_markers.2pm_green: A defined afternoon downtrend was underway with shallow bounces and continued seller control.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: The session closed near its lows after a late flush, with only a minor bounce from the final demand pocket.

takeaway: Bearish distribution day with an opening failure, a rejected mid-session rebound, and a persistent afternoon lower-high decline into a near-low close.
